change.summary: The live Playwright phone smoke now fails closed unless window.__MC_DEPLOYMENT_IDENTITY__ exists, contains a normalized immutable 40-character commit SHA, reports source-identified, and matches its machine-readable meta marker.
change.optional_exact_match: EXPECTED_DEPLOYMENT_COMMIT may require the deployed commit to equal an expected SHA.
change.provider_check: A .vercel.app host must classify the runtime provider as vercel.

falsification_route: The slice is falsified if a missing, malformed, mutable, mismatched, or non-Vercel deployment identity passes.
The audio claim remains unverified until the live gate passes and an iPhone audible outcome is paired with runtime evidence.
privacy: No private chat, health material, credentials, payment, or conversion logic included.
